'''Republic Redux''' was the smallest of the three [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] member groups in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]], under [[Yeeru Chivkyrie]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Chivkyrie, being a second-tier [[Adarian/Legends|Adarian]], kept his recruitment almost exclusively to other second-tiers.

{{Reb-stub}}
